headline: Enphase Lawsuits And Solar Partnership Present Mixed Signals For Investors
summary: Multiple law firms have launched class action lawsuits against Enphase Energy alleging misleading statements about inventory management and the impact of a terminated residential clean energy tax credit, with investors urged to act before an upcoming court deadline. Enphase Energy has also announced a new partnership with Capital Good Fund to support mission driven solar projects in the U.S., using its domestic manufacturing capacity and latest microinverter products. For investors watching...
